title: A Singapore Teen Just Shattered the Mr. Potato Head World Record
script: A teenager in Singapore just broke the world record for fastest assembly of a Mr. Potato Head, completing the classic toy in 4.63 seconds. The official Guinness time smashes the previous record and was caught entirely on video. The teen, a competitive Rubik's cube solver, said the fine motor skills transferred directly. Guinness certified it this week. Nobody asked for a Mr. Potato Head world record. Someone made one anyway.
